description: Comprehensive manual QA/QC testing of codecamp-advantage on the local development server. Covers auth, i18n, dashboard, lessons, quizzes, AI chat, PR workflow, admin panel, edge cases, and performance.
deviation_notes: Testing completed with kimi-webbridge automation. Created test intern account (qatestintern2) to verify full student flow. Results: 41 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 partial. ALL ISSUES FIXED: 1) Chat AI - OPENROUTER_API_KEY rotated, streaming works. 2) Quiz progress save - Fixed Date format in packages/domain/src/codecamp/index.ts. 3) PR form - Verified working correctly. 4) Locked module UX - Added tooltip with prerequisite module name. 5) Dashboard ARIA - Added role=progressbar and aria-* attributes. Full report at measure/tracks/codecamp_qa_local_20260517/qa-report.md
